messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: Actually no. The antenna is about 30 feet away from when I use my companion radios, 10 feet off the ground. I can remote admin my repeater using my companion. I can connect to it even if I am right under the antenna. I have had no problem connecting to my repeater or have it repeat to my companions.
messages.content_html: Actually no. The antenna is about 30 feet away from when I use my companion radios, 10 feet off the ground. I can remote admin my repeater using my companion. I can connect to it even if I am right under the antenna. I have had no problem connecting to my repeater or have it repeat to my companions.
messages.reply_html:
MrWeavis
Have you been able to notice any loss of closer nodes due to the higher gain of this antenna, as claimed by Rokland?

messages.author: MrWeavis
messages.text: Thanks. Yep, every installation is different.
messages.content_html: Thanks. Yep, every installation is different.
